} /** * Add StatusCallbackMethod attribute. * * @param string $statusCallbackMethod Status callback URL method */ public function setStatusCallbackMethod($statusCallbackMethod): self { return $this->setAttribute('statusCallbackMethod', $statusCallbackMethod);
